blended.narrative: Waterville Valley is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 17 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 46°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: light rain showers, highs of 48°F.
Saturday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 9" of heavy snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
